description: Review the feature-local design update and route back to Step 2 when high or mid findings exist.
promptTemplate: You are the feature-local Step 3 design review branch. Review the Step 2 feature design against runtimeVariables.fanout.item and the accepted issue scope. Classify findings as high, mid, or low. Set when.needs_revision true only when any high or mid finding exists. Return adapter JSON with payload.workflowMode, payload.issueReference, payload.featureId, payload.reviewDecision, payload.needs_revision, payload.accepted, payload.findings, payload.feedback, and payload.risks.

output.description: Return adapter JSON with when.needs_revision and feature-local design review findings.
